message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "CenterCoordinator" as CC
participant "DataFromLegacySystemUI" as UI
participant "DataFromLegacySystemController" as Controller
participant "ReadLegacyDataFile" as Reader
participant "Company" as Company
participant "SNSUserStore" as Store
participant "App" as App
participant "VaccinationCenter" as Center
participant "vaccinationCentersStore" as Store2

CC -> UI: 1 Asks to load a CSV file with legacy data
UI -> Controller: 2 DataFromLegacySystemController()
Controller -> Store2: 3 getVaccinationCentersStore()
Store2 --> Controller: 4 returns the store
Controller -> Center: 5 getVaccinationCenterAssociatedToCoordinator(id)
Center --> Controller: 6 returns the vaccination center
Controller -> Reader: 7 ReadLegacyDataFile(center)
Reader --> Controller: 8 request path of the CSV file
Controller -> UI: 9 types path
UI -> Reader: 10 readFile(path)
Reader -> Reader: 11 readFile(String path)
alt while csv has new lines
  Reader -> Store: 12 validateFileLegacy(SNSUserNumber, firstDate, secondDate, thirdDate, fourthDate)
  Store --> Reader: 13 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called legacyDataList
  Reader -> Store: 14 getSNSUserList()
  Store --> Reader: 15 returns list
  Reader -> Store: 16 returns list
  Reader -> Store: 17 returns list
  Reader -> Store: 18 returns list
  Reader -> Store: 19 returns list
  alt while legacyDataList has new lines
    Reader -> Store: 20 findPosOfSNSUserInSNSUserList, values, positionInSNSUserList
    Store --> Reader: 21 findPosOfVaxxVaccineList, values, positionInVaccinesList
    Reader -> Store: 22 checksDuplicates(updatedList, snsUsersList, vaccineList, positionInSNSUserList, positionInVaccinesList, lineOfTheData)
    Store --> Reader: 23 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called updatedList
    Reader -> Center: 24 createArrival()
    Center --> Reader: 25 returns Arrival
    Center -> Store2: 26 returns Arrival
    Store2 --> Reader: 27 Saves arrival into List<Arrival> called arrivalsList
    Store2 -> Store2: 28 genericsArrivals.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_ARRIVALS, arrivalsList)
    Reader -> Center: 29 createDeparture()
    Center --> Reader: 30 returns departure
    Center -> Store2: 31 returns departure
    Store2 --> Reader: 32 Saves departure into List<Departure> called departuresList
    Store2 -> Store2: 33 genericsDeparture.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_DEPARTURES, departuresList)
  end
end
Controller -> Reader: 34 returns updatedList
Reader -> UI: 35 returns updatedList
UI -> Controller: 36 requests the option to sort
Controller -> UI: 37 selects option
UI -> Controller: 38 chooseCriteriaToSortOption()
Controller -> Reader: 39 setListOption()
alt while updatedList has new lines
  Reader -> Reader: 40 Saves data to a List<LocalDateTime> called listToSort
end
alt algorithmToBeUsed = "InsertionSort", option = "0" - Ascending
  UI -> Controller: 41 requests the order of the sort
  Controller -> UI: 42 selects order
  UI -> Controller: 43 getAlgorithm()
  Controller -> App: 44 getSortingAlgorithm()
  App --> Controller: 45 returns algorithm
  Controller -> Reader: 46 returns algorithm
  Reader -> Reader: 47 sortListWithAlgorithmToBeUsed(option)
  Reader -> Reader: 48 insertionSortAscending()
  Reader --> Reader: 49 returns sortedList
  Reader -> UI: 50 returns sortedList
  UI -> UI: 51 prints sortedList
end
alt algorithmToBeUsed = "InsertionSort", option = "1" - Descending
  UI -> Controller: 52 selects order
  Controller -> App: 53 getAlgorithm()
  App --> Controller: 54 returns algorithm
  Controller -> Reader: 55 returns algorithm
  Reader -> Reader: 56 returns algorithm
  Reader -> Reader: 57 sortListWithAlgorithmToBeUsed(option)
  Reader -> Reader: 58 insertionSortDescending()
  Reader --> Reader: 59 returns sortedList
  Reader -> UI: 60 returns sortedList
  UI -> UI: 61 prints sortedList
end

@enduml
